title: Self-hosted Kubernetes cluster of 3 nodes
description: I've recently built a 10-inch, 5U tall mini-rack with a k3s cluster of 3 nodes. We'll see what I'll be hosting on it, I primarily did it to play around with kubernetes outside of the plain developer side

title: Togethernet Events
description: The main web application for Togethernet. Commits are tested in gitlab-ci pipelines, deployments are managed by ArgoCD, then they go to our school's Openshift. The app uses Sentry and Laravel Pulse for system monitoring.

title: 3d-printer modding
description: The first printer I personally owned was an Elegoo Neptune 4 Pro. I've done many modifications to it and helped others in the community.
